name: E2E: a scraped standards source (Google-SWE-style) is segmented into discrete rules, each with a content-hash provenance
command:
printf '# Google SWE Standards

## Use const not var
Use const in TypeScript.

## Pin Terraform versions
Terraform must pin required_version.

## Record an ADR
Design decisions are recorded as an architecture decision record.
' > src.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/extract-rules-from-url.sh" --source src.md --source-id google-swe --json > rules.json 2>e.txt && grep -q 'rules=3' e.txt && node -e 'const r=require(process.cwd()+"/rules.json");if(r.length!==3)process.exit(1);if(!r.every(x=>x.content_hash&&/^sha256:/.test(x.content_hash)&&x.source==="google-swe"))process.exit(1)' && echo e2e1-scrape-extract-provenance 1>&2
